title: Marketing Associate
description: Sei einer der ersten BewerberMarketing AssociateACE Alternatives GmbHRoleWe’re looking for aMarketing Associateto help elevate our brand, shape engaging content, and execute impactful campaigns across multiple channels.In this role, you’ll support initiatives spanningsocial media, newsletters, events, and product launches,bringing ideas to life that inspire, inform, and connect. You’ll work closely with a dynamic team in a fast-paced, entrepreneurial environment at the intersection ofstartups, fintech, and innovation.Assist in planning and executing cross-channel marketing campaignsCreate and curate content for social media, email newsletters, and blog postsSupport event coordination and product launch communicationsHelp maintain brand consistency across all touchpointsTrack campaign performance and suggest improvements based on insightsPosition DetailsAre you a creative thinker with a passion for storytelling and a keen eye for detail?Marketing AssociateLanguage RequiredEnglish (Fluent), German (Fluent)Strong writing and communication skillsA curious mindset and willingness to learnPrevious internship or experience in marketing is a plusInterest in startups, VC, or tech is a bonus!This role offers:LocationBERLIN – In PersonEngagement TypeFull TimeAt ACE Alternatives, we foster a culture of innovation, collaboration, and impact.Flexible working arrangements.The opportunity to work with a fast-growing, entrepreneurial team.A chance to make a tangible impact on the financial direction of the organization.As a precautionary reminder, please be aware that ACE Alternatives will never request any form of payment from candidates at any stage of the recruitment process.konstantin.pfeil@ace-alternatives.comAt ACE Alternatives, we are committed to creating a diverse, inclusive, and respectful workplace. Employment decisions are based solely on qualifications, merit, and business needs. We do not discriminate based on age, race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity or expression, national origin, ancestry, citizenship, disability, marital status, veteran status, genetic information, or any other status protected by applicable law.How to ApplyGehaltNeugierig auf das Gehalt für diesen Job?Gehalt anzeigenChart iconMin €Max €ACE Alternatives GmbH
